Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add real cost & earnings data: €5 delivery, €2 personal shopper, rider +140% earnings vs Glovo

✅ REAL NUMBERS BASED ON 2024 DATA:

RIDER EARNINGS (300 consegne/mese):
• GLOVO: €2,50/consegna = €9.000/anno (guadagni in calo, -22,7% ultimi 4 anni)
• DLOOP base: €5,00/consegna = €18.000/anno (+100% vs Glovo)
• DLOOP + personal shopper: €7,00 media = €20.400/anno (+127% vs Glovo!)

CUSTOMER COST BREAKDOWN (Example order):
€5,00 → Product (Dealer)
€5,00 → Consegna (Rider service, media Italia)
€2,00 → Personal Shopper (opzionale, rider consulenza)
€0,99 → DLOOP platform (WhatsApp, payments, infra)
= €10,99 base | €12,99 con personal shopper

DEALER SAVINGS:
• GLOVO: €7,50 per ordine (30% commission on €25)
• DLOOP: €0,99 per ordine FISSO
• Savings: €6,51/ordine = €7.812/anno (100 ordini/mese)

KEY INSIGHT: Everyone gets paid fairly
- Dealer: keeps full control, saves €6,51 vs Glovo per order
- Rider: earns 2.8x more (€7 vs €2,50) + autonomy
- DLOOP: scales on €0,99 = pure SaaS leverage
- Customer: transparent pricing, supports local riders

SOURCES: Decreto Milano (Glovo 2024), Sky TG24 (rider data Italy 2026), FanPage tech

FILES UPDATED:
• v2-saas/COSTI_CLIENTE_FINALE_SEMPLICE.html - Full detailed breakdown
• v2-saas/DLOOP_INVESTOR_PITCH_2026.html - Updated cost table

fix(logging): Use ImmediateExecutorService in logging tests and fix Log4j2 scopes usage (#5158)

* fix(logging): Use ImmediateExecutorService in logging tests and fix Log4j2 scopes usage

Allow injecting ISentryExecutorService into LoggerBatchProcessor for deterministic test execution. Fix Log4j2 SentryAppender to use scopes instance instead of static Sentry calls for logging.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(log4j2): Move super.start() into start(OptionsConfiguration) overload

Ensures the appender is marked as started regardless of which entry
point is used, preventing loggerContext.start() from re-triggering
the no-arg start() and reinitializing Sentry without the test executor.

commit.message:
Fix stdio client hang: 30s timeout on pre-tick fetch

The stdio MCP adapter subprocess would occasionally hang, blocking
the async worker forever. With 3 max concurrent workers, 3 hung
fetches meant the entire company stopped ticking.

Fix: wrap the sync stdio client call in run_in_executor with a
30-second asyncio.wait_for timeout. If it hangs, the worker logs
a warning and moves on to the next tick cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ezsp): handle async callbacks, PAN ID rejection, and v14 struct parsing

- Rewrite Command() to skip asynchronous callbacks (e.g., stackStatusHandler)
  that arrive before the actual command response, using conn.Recv() in a loop
- Generate random PAN ID (0x0001-0xFFFE) when default 0xFFFF is used, since
  the broadcast address is rejected by NCP firmware
- Restructure network init flow: try networkInit first, only set security
  state and formNetwork if no stored network exists
- Fix GetNetworkParameters parsing for EZSP v14 extended struct (25 bytes
  vs 22) by reading TxPower/Channel from fixed offsets relative to the end
- Resume stored network in runNetworkState after ASH reset clears NCP state
- Add response debug logging with hex-encoded params

Add competitive landscape global attempts research (Vetster, PetDesk, Anolla)

Update research notes and pitch decks (EN + ZH) with new findings:
- Vetster: telehealth-only marketplace, $12.25M CAD raised, AU expansion stalled
- PetDesk: 7M+ users but clinic loyalty app, not a marketplace
- Anolla: closest concept but Europe-only, tiny scale
- Key insight: real-time in-clinic availability + cross-clinic search + AU = greenfield

fix: use admin client in invite accept route to bypass RLS

invite as used before inserting team member.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: 修复秒杀系统的三个核心并发安全问题

1. blockHandler 现在调用排队服务
   - 被 Sentinel 限流的请求进入排队系统，而不是直接拒绝
   - 用户获得 ticketId，可轮询查询处理结果

2. onRecover() 使用 Redis 事务确保原子性
   - 使用 MULTI/EXEC 事务同步一人一单数据
   - 避免同步期间新请求绕过一人一单检查

3. 清理代码问题
   - 移除重复的 hikari 配置块
   - 清理重复的 import 语句

Allows specifying custom date ranges for historical scraping:

Defaults remain unchanged (today to season end) when flags are omitted.
